chunks.text: ORDER SHEET IN THE HIGH COURT OF SINDH, KARACHI C. P. NO. D-10 / 2021 ___________________________________________________________ Date Order with signature of Judge ___________________________________________________________ PRIORITY. 1) For hearing of CMA No. 50/2021. 2) For hearing of CMA No. 58/2021. 3) For hearing of main case. 06.08.2024.
